nodes.context: Assyrian criminal organization active in southwestern Sydney, involved in drug trafficking, murders, and shootings.
Predecessor gang to DLASTHR, active in 1990s, implicated in the murder of off-duty police officer David Carty.
Rival gang to DLASTHR, involved in turf war over drug supply in Sydney's western suburbs.
Outlaw motorcycle gang; former member Adrian Buxton was murdered, possibly by DLASTHR.
Outlaw motorcycle gang; member Alen Moradian was murdered, and Luke Sparos was charged with the murder.
Rival gang to DLASTHR according to infobox.

edges.context: DLASTHR originated from the Assyrian Kings after the latter fell apart following Carty's murder.
Turf war over drug supply led to drive-by shootings and firebombings in the 2010s.
DLASTHR is suspected of murdering ex-Nomads member Adrian Buxton.
Luke Sparos, charged with murder of Comanchero member Alen Moradian, also attempted murder of DLASTHR member Samer Marcus.
Listed as rivals in the infobox.
